overall.description: A first-person exploration of a cyberpunk rooftop plaza at night, featuring a mix of traditional Japanese shrine architecture with futuristic neon-lit skyscrapers. The player character walks around the illuminated rooftop, observing digital billboards, a parked sports car, and the sprawling cityscape below. The scene is from the video game Cyberpunk 2077, showcasing high-fidelity graphics with neon-drenched lighting and reflective wet surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop plaza with illuminated LED floor tiles

agents.ego_description: standing on the rooftop plaza, slowly panning right to take in the cityscape view

entered.detail: large digital screen displaying 'I HEART DESIRE' with pink cherry blossom imagery
traditional red Japanese torii gate with red paper lanterns
traditional wooden Japanese shrine building behind the torii gate
illuminated floor tiles arranged in geometric patterns with warm yellow lighting
futuristic building with distinctive wavy glass roof structure visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a cyberpunk rooftop plaza at night, dominated by a large digital billboard displaying 'I HEART DESIRE' above a traditional red torii gate. The camera pans right across LED-illuminated floor tiles, revealing a sprawling cityscape with a distinctive wavy glass roof structure and distant skyscrapers against the dark night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop overlook with panoramic city view

agents.ego_description: panning left across the city skyline, observing distant industrial chimneys and the urban sprawl

entered.detail: tall industrial smokestacks emitting red glowing lights against the night horizon
dense cluster of illuminated skyscrapers and high-rise buildings

segments.scene_description: The camera continues to pan across the panoramic city view, showcasing industrial chimneys with red warning lights and the sprawling urban landscape. The wavy glass building moves across the frame as the view shifts back toward the shrine area, with the illuminated floor tiles remaining visible in the foreground.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop plaza with parked vehicle and shrine approach

agents.ego_description: walking forward through the plaza toward the shrine area, approaching a parked vehicle

notable_agents.action: sleek black sports car parked on the illuminated plaza near the shrine entrance

entered.detail: large vertical billboard displaying a monochrome image of a tennis player
tall skyscraper covered in pink neon digital displays with Japanese text

segments.scene_description: The camera moves forward through the plaza, revealing a sleek black sports car parked near the shrine entrance. Large digital billboards including one with a tennis player and a tall pink neon tower become prominent as the perspective shifts, while the torii gate and shrine building grow larger in the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: shrine entrance approach with stone lanterns

agents.ego_description: walking toward and passing through the red torii gate into the shrine precinct

entered.detail: traditional Japanese stone lanterns with warm lighting flanking the entrance path

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the traditional shrine, moving past the parked car and toward the illuminated red torii gate. Stone lanterns line the path as the camera enters the shrine precinct, with the shrine building's wooden architecture becoming more detailed and prominent.

scene_state.functional_zone: shrine courtyard with reflective water pool

events.description: flying aerial vehicle passes overhead in the distance against the night sky

agents.ego_description: walking past the shrine building, observing the courtyard water feature and surrounding billboards

notable_agents.action: flying aerial vehicle passing through the night sky above the cityscape

entered.detail: rectangular pool of water with illuminated edges reflecting the neon lights
large digital billboard displaying 'FERVID YAKUZA' in bright green neon letters

segments.scene_description: Moving past the shrine structure, the camera reveals a rectangular water pool in the courtyard reflecting the neon lights. A flying vehicle passes by in the distance, and a large green 'FERVID YAKUZA' billboard becomes prominent on the left as the shrine building moves to the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop walkway along building edge with neon towers

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrow path beside the building, looking up at the towering neon advertisements

entered.detail: skyscraper facade covered in massive vertical pink neon displays

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera moving along a narrow walkway beside the shrine, with the water pool falling behind. The view opens up to reveal the towering pink neon skyscraper dominating the center frame, while various illuminated billboards line the left side as the exploration continues along the rooftop edge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a neon-drenched rooftop plaza that transitions from a wide panoramic city view to an intimate exploration of a traditional shrine. It begins by panning across LED-illuminated floor tiles and a large digital billboard above a red torii gate, sweeping across a sprawling cityscape featuring a wavy glass roof and industrial chimneys. As the camera moves forward, the perspective shifts past a sleek black sports car toward the shrine entrance, where stone lanterns and pink neon towers grow more prominent in the frame. The scene then flows into the shrine precinct, passing the wooden architecture to reveal a reflective water pool and a flying vehicle in the distance before a green billboard emerges on the left. Finally, the camera glides along a narrow walkway, leaving the pool behind as the view opens up to a towering pink neon skyscraper dominating the horizon.
